6b31d61c-3bc7-44fd-b071-a609c080bba9;Premium Purchases Are Now Available!;"

Dear Relic explorers
column2: we are pleased to announce that you can now purchase relic tokens directly from your Account page.

column1: We are using the Stripe payment platform and are offering three purchase ""products

column2: we will only support payment via credit card
column3: with billing options in USD and BRL. We hope to add new payment methods in the future to better suit your preferences.

column2: we have a special offer for the purchase of 01 promotional relic token
column3: which can only be purchased once per account and cannot be withdrawn in-game as premium scroll. This promotional token can only be activated on your own account.

column1: Each relic token can be exchanged for 30 days of premium for your own account
column2: or can be redeemed in-game (if it is not promotional) through a premium scroll
column3: which can be traded with other players and exchanged with any post NPC for premium days.
